feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP RISE DMO Migration - Storage Migration Server
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I'm not quite clear about the storage on the migration server and whether we need additional storage there. In the presentation, the storage details for the HANA directories (/hana/shared; /hana/data and /hana/log) are missing. How much memory is available to us there?

And if we realize during the first migration that we need more memory, how quickly could it be made available to us?

entry.title: How to start a career as a SAP Functional Consultant?
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAP community.

I just finished my master's degree in business and product management. During my studies, I found a keen interest in SAP, specially in S/4HANA.

Because of this, I am aspiring on becoming a functional consultant. To do so, I currently find myself doing the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA", plus an institutional overview course on SAP S/4HANA. My goal is to take the SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA.

Does this certificate covers the requirements to start a career as a functional business processes consultant in SAP S/4HANA? What else should I consider to start my career as a SAP S/4HANA consultant?

I appreciate in advance the support and guidance you may provide.

Best regards,

Erick Dos Santos.

entry.title: How to connect to GCP Storage Bucket provided with Handover files to transfer Backup to SAP Rise
entry.content:
How to connect to GCP Storage Bucket provided by SAP with Handover files to transfer Backup to SAP Rise

The purpose of this blog is to demonstrate how to connect to the GCP Bucket with the credentials provided by SAP via sharepoint through the files Handover "<sid><prefix-customer>_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx".

In this demonstration we will use an operating system SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP5.

 

Example of a file "<sid><prefix-customer>_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx".

 

Creating the .JSON file

Start by creating a .JSON file with the information contained in the file  "_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx"

Copy the contents of the "JSON File Details" contained within the characters { }.

Example:

Paste into a notepad and save with the extension .json

Example:

 

Create a directory on the operating system from where you will transfer the backup and save the generated .json file. You can use the same directory for the next download and installation activities of the gsutil tool that will use this .json.

 

Installing of GSUTIL

Use this official documentation: https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/gsutil_install?hl=pt-br#linux

Switch to the folder you created in the previous step with the command "cd".

Download: 

curl -O https://dl.google.com/dl/cloudsdk/channels/rapid/downloads/google-cloud-cli-linux-x86_64.tar.gz

Extract:

tar -xf google-cloud-cli-linux-x86_64.tar.gz

Installing:

./google-cloud-sdk/install.sh

You can use the default options during installation, in my case it was like this:

Log out and start a new session for the changes to take effect.

 

Register with the account contained in the .json

Use the command below changing it to the path of your .json file, you will have a result similar to the image.

gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file=/gsutil/gcp-key1.json

 

Validate access to GCP Storage Bucket

Use the ls command to list the directories on your account.

Examples:

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/

After the first copy just adjust the path to list sub directories

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/HD4-21032025

 

In my case, I did not identify the account name, I had to ask the Project Lead because this information was not included in the brownfield file.

The list of bucket names should be returned with the command

gcloud storage ls --project=my-project

In the example below, I am listing the remote directory with a backup copy that I made.

Next, I will pass the command to execute a copy.

 

Copying your backup to GCP Bucket Storage

Run the command "gsutil -m cp -r SOURCE gs://TARGET/"

Example:

gsutil -m cp -r SOURCE-FOLDER-OF-YOUR-BACKUP gs://saheXXXtransferXX01/

After the copy is complete, you can list the files again with the command:

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/HD4-21032025/

The -m parameter is used to copy files in parallel,
more details about advanced parameters can be found at this official link: https://cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/storage/cp

In the example above, the 237GB copy took 2 hours, the speed will depend on the upload speed of your internet connection.

In the same example, I performed a HANA backup with a 20GB Split. This helps in case of a very large file failure so that you don't have to reprocess everything from the beginning.

 

 

After finishing, you just need to request a copy of the GCP Bucket backup to the /Migration directory, which is probably mounted on your Skeleton system database server. To do this, open the Service Request with the "Download Data from Cloud to Block Storage" template, providing details of the source and destination such as SID, hostname, IP, source and destination path.

entry.title: Is there a scope item which support the Intracompany STO process in S4 Hana Private Cloud?
entry.content:
We require the Intracompany Stock Transfer with delivery process for S4 Private Cloud, at the moment we haven´t found any scope item with this functionality.

For Public Cloud the scope item "BME - Intracompany STO with delivery process" supports this functionality, but it is not enabled for private.

 Is there any scope item which support the "Intracompany STO with delivery process" in S4 Hana Private Cloud?,

entry.title: Manage Components and Services F6178 app availability
entry.content:
Is the Manage Components and Services F6178 app only available on Public Cloud? According to the fiori apps library page it is https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6178')/S34. Same information is also on the Maintenance Backlog Overview F5105 app's fiori library page, F6178 is on the Related Apps tab only if you select the public cloud version.

However, if you select the private cloud/on-premise version of F5105 and go to app documentation, the F6178 is mentioned as a navigation target https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e72f747389b340229f7fa343975bfa57/2bde7398f9074619a9ffb467c13785f4.html

entry.title: Cost Center and Profit Center Hierarchy Not Appearing in "Manage Global Hierarchies" App in Fiori
entry.content:
Hello,

I created the cost center and profit center hierarchy in SAP GUI, but they are not appearing in the "Manage Global Hierarchies" app in Fiori. The Key User has requested that these hierarchies be visible in Fiori, as they are unable to view them in the Fiori interface at the moment.

I would like to know if there is any additional procedure that needs to be followed in order for the hierarchies created in SAP GUI to become visible and accessible in Fiori, or if there are any configurations or adjustments required to integrate this information correctly between SAP GUI and Fiori.

Thank you for your guidance on how we can resolve this issue.

Best regards,

entry.title: Condition contract management set different document number ranges for accruals credit memos
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to set different credit memos number ranges when using accruals, such that one number range is not transferred to financial accounting e.g. for accruals and the other real credit memo (e.g. created at partial and final settlements) has another number range which is then transferred to financial accounting?

Thank you!

entry.title: S4 HANA Cloud Private, Standard Intracompany STO vs CAL Intracompany STO
entry.content:
Hi all,

We require to use the Intracompany STO process in S4 HANA Private Cloud, our understanding we can perform the corresponding configurations and carry on the Intracompany STO process, our question raises related using CAL instance (Cloud Appliance Library) ready to run and preconfigured for Intracompany STO process.

What are the differences between Intracompany STO process with corresponding standard configuration and using CAL STO process instance into S4 Hana Private Cloud for Intracompany?

Can we use for our target system (production system) the Intracompany STO process with corresponding standard configuration or it is mandatory to use CAL instance for Intracompany STO process?

Thanks for your comments

entry.title: Manage Purchase Requisitions filtering
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want the user to only see requests in Manage Purchase Requisitions app (F2229) opened by users in their own department.

Thanks a lot for your help

Best regards

entry.title: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2 ABAP Cloud Development in single class?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to create multiple APIs for tier2 to consume the same in Tier1. Is it advisable to create all the wrapper objects in a single class as a separate method or should we go with individual wrapper class for each classic API?

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: How to disable "Post" authorization in app "Change Parked Journal Entries" (FBV2)
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We are attempting to identify a relevant authozation object for posting in app "Change Parked Journal Entries" (FBV2) in our private cloud system.

Specifically, we would like to control the post button function in the below screenshot.

Initially, we suspected an action "Post" in the authorization object "F_BKPF_BUK" but it does not seem to disable the "Post" button on the fiori side.

Could you help to identify the necessary authorization object to be restricted to disable posting?

Tahnk you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Translation is not working on a "My inbox" custom tile.
entry.content:
Dear Experts!

We have created a custom tile out of a standard "My inbox" tile by adding changes to one of the parameters (listsize) to match customer's requirement.

We are aware that the translation fuction for tiles do not work for the tile title once thr tile is customized and we changed the title to Japanese so that it is shown in Japanese in fiori.

However, we noticed that the "Release" and "Reject" buttons on the bottom right are still in English. Since teh customer only uses Japanese for their business, we are hoping to find a way to somehow configure and change these to Japanese.

Could I ask if it is possible to do so?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Intercompany Billing without Sales Order or STO
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'd like to receive some suggestion about intercompany billing in this scenario that I am following:

- we are using PS to manage customer projects: several WBS elements are used to generate material requirements directly in 1 or more manufacturing units, using network activities for each manufacturing plant; materials are produced in manufacturing plants and then delivered (with CNS0) to the installation site. no Purchase Order or STO but requirements directly in the manufacturing unit from where is delivered to installation site.

- a sales order exist for the entire project and will create customer billing based on billing plan.

- Resource related intercompany billing will be used for intercompany billing for hours registered for installation activities 

- Legal and group valuation exist

how would you suggest to trigger intercompany billing?

entry.title: Private Cloud Turkey ( edocument cockpit)
entry.content: In the private cloud project in Turkey, when I try to send an invoice via 'eDocument cockpit,' it gives a 'shipping type' error. I checked, and there is no such field in the 'configured value mapping' for Turkey. How can I bypass this error? I would appreciate your solution.

entry.title: How to use S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition data with PowerBI
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

Hope you're all doing well. A brief summary of my situation: I need to use data that's being stored in S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, a bunch of already-defined tables, to use said data with PowerBI. My current issue is finding any way to access the S/4HANA Cloud data externally!

This is my first time trying to use SAP data with PBI and would like to read your ideas to achieve such a connection!

I'm currently leaning towards using automation tools (such as Power Automate) for data extraction from SAP GUI and then use it con PBI, althought the refresh frequency is a big disadvantage.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Daniel.

entry.title: Project system in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have requirements for a customer to configure capital and logistics project for a Client who has selected RISE with SAP. However, there are no scope items for projects within Private Edition. How should we proceed if we want enable managing of enterprise projects for customer within SAP which would include Procurement and Production processes and also resource and time management? Can we do it by ourself by following the script from Public Cloud or do we need to request SAP as addional service under EML to help us in setting up the system?

Regards,
Arnab

entry.title: How to Exclude Reservation from MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m trying to find a way to exclude specific reservations from appearing in MD04.

The use case is based on a condition in the reservation (when RESB-XWAOK is initial). In such cases, we want to prevent the reservation from being considered in MRP and ideally have it not show up in MD04 at all.

While researching possible enhancements, I came across the BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA.

My question is: Is it possible to use MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA to exclude reservation entries from MD04? If so, what’s the recommended approach? If not, is there another BAdI or enhancement point that would be more suitable for this requirement?

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: The functionalities and components of SAP are influenced by Business User Management (CA-GTF-BUM)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,
I’m seeking clarification regarding specific SAP configurations or components that necessitate the use of a Business User.

I’ve reviewed several SAP Notes, including:
2570961 – Simplification item S4TWL - Business User Management
2763781 – SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Use Sales Employee in SD without HR integration
3094750 – Business User Management - FAQ

However, these resources do not comprehensively list the full range of functionalities or modules that depend on the Business User Management.
From my current understanding and experience, I know that the Responsibility Management for Flexible Workflow and Situation Handling are two key functionalities that require users to be defined as Business Partners with the BUP003 role.

I’m interested to know if there are additional SAP functionalities or components, based on your implementation experience that also depend on this role. Specifically, I’m trying to assess pros and cons to use Business User (BP with role BUP003) for our scope or if we can continue using the classic SU01 user model for certain processes.

Any insights, especially those backed by implementation experience in SAP S/4HANA, would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support and shared knowledge.

entry.title: Reset ANLC to rebuild a depreciation area - S/4 HANA private Cloud
entry.content:
Hey everyone, 

I'm facing the following problem in SAP S/4 HANA private Cloud.

We built a new depreciation area 51 afterward, which was supposed to take over values from depreciation area 01. We ran the AFAR transaction, but haven’t posted any depreciation yet. Unfortunately, during the AFAR process, 18 entries were created in ANEP as acquisitions.

Now, I need to deactivate depreciation area 51 again and remove the values from the assets (ANLC) so that no further calculations are made and everything is clean again.

Does anyone have experience with this?

Best regards.

Marleen

entry.title: Can we use Adobe document service with s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

can we use privately hosted ADS or on-premise ADS with s/4 hana cloud private for pdf generation.

 

regards

narendra
